items.title: Mobile Submission and Smart Audit Release
items.description: Release focused on faster mobile submission, stronger OCR extraction, and more explainable smart-audit prioritization.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Reduce the time employees need to capture and submit routine expenses.
Increase first-pass extraction quality on mobile receipts.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase repeated employee usage of the mobile workflow.

productBricks.change: Improve extraction quality and field confidence handling.
Reduce taps required for submission and approval actions.
Improve risk explanations for managers and finance reviewers.

deliveryChannels.change: Release updated mobile capture and approval flows.

items.title: Travel Policy and Approval Release
items.description: Release focused on tighter travel-feed ingestion, earlier trip policy checks, and cleaner pre-trip approval routing.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase the share of trips booked within policy.
Raise the share of travel spend governed before booking completion.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase the amount of travel volume running through controlled workflows.

productBricks.change: Improve booking and itinerary feed reliability.
Improve route, class, and supplier rule evaluation.
Improve travel approval routing and escalation.

deliveryChannels.change: Release updated trip workspace and approval views.

items.title: Card Match and Reimbursement Release
items.description: Release focused on card-transaction matching quality, exception handling, and reimbursement-state transparency.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase the share of card transactions reconciled without manual finance work.

customerKPIs.kpi: Monthly close cycle for employee spend
customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Reduce time needed to complete month-end employee spend close.

businessKPIs.kpi: Card attach in managed spend accounts
businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve adoption of card-backed spend management.

productBricks.change: Improve card-to-receipt matching and unresolved exception handling.
Improve reimbursement-state visibility and payout batching.
Improve card admin setup and cardholder activation workflows.

deliveryChannels.change: Release updated reimbursement and card exception views.

items.title: Finance Export and Spend Intelligence Release
items.description: Release focused on cleaner accounting exports, tax handling, and spend-leakage dashboards for finance and travel leaders.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase finance trust in exported and archived spend records.

customerKPIs.kpi: Monthly close cycle for employee spend
customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Reduce export and reconciliation delays at month-end.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase adoption of finance and analytics workflows in strategic accounts.

productBricks.change: Improve entity-aware ERP mapping and export validation.
Improve tax-friendly coding and export outputs.
Improve spend leakage and supplier analytics dashboards.

deliveryChannels.change: Release updated finance and analytics dashboards.
